name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: generate_cro_copy
prompts.template: Create high-converting copy for a landing page targeting {target_audience} promoting {product_service}.
prompts.use_case: Automated generation of high-converting landing page copy

prompts.name: seo_optimization
prompts.template: Optimize the following content for SEO with keywords: {keywords}. Content: {content}
prompts.use_case: SEO optimization for website content using AI

prompts.name: analytics_insights
prompts.template: Analyze this marketing analytics data and provide actionable insights: {analytics_data}
prompts.use_case: Generating analytics insights from user or campaign data

prompts.name: growth_engineering_plan
prompts.template: Develop a growth engineering plan to increase {metric} for {product_service}.
prompts.use_case: Designing and implementing growth-driven engineering strategies
